channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: This money-saving emporium is like Facebook Marketplace for gift cards
item.description: You don’t have to be an avid reader of restaurant industry trade publications—though I can attest that they are oddly fascinating—to realize that everything’s getting more expensive. The good news is that there’s an easy way to counteract those rising menu prices.
item.dc:creator: Jared Newman, Fast Company

item.title: OpenAI’s company knowledge wants access to all of your internal data
item.description: OpenAI on Thursday rolled out its latest offering, a comprehensive data collection and analysis capability called “company knowledge”.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Scammers try to trick LastPass users into giving up credentials by telling them they’re dead
item.description: Are you sure you’re still alive? If so, you may fall for a phishing scam aimed at getting the master login passwords of LastPass password manager users. OK, this sounds weird, but in some ways it isn’t.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Scientists spot skyscraper-sized asteroid racing through solar system
item.description: Astronomers have discovered asteroid 2025 SC79, a skyscraper-sized space rock orbiting the sun in just 128 days. the second-fastest known.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Zelle plans to expand bank-owned payments network to outside US
item.description: Zelle, the bank-owned service that facilitates consumer money movement, said it plans to expand its services internationally.
item.dc:creator: Bloomberg, The Mercury News

item.title: Why Nvidia just invested in a battery recycling company
item.description: As Nvidia’s value has soared—becoming the first public company to hit $4 trillion in market capitalization earlier this year—it’s been pouring money into AI startups. Its venture arm, NVentures, is also backing less expected bets.
item.dc:creator: Adele Peters, Fast Company

item.title: Apple may turn off key privacy tool in Europe
item.description: In a victory for surveillance capitalism, Apple may be forced to leave its users in Europe vulnerable to rapacious ad data collection in response to “intense lobbying” by politicians in the region.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Trump 'terribly advised' on crypto billionaire pardon: Key supporter
item.description: Venture capitalist Joe Lonsdale, a key supporter of President Trump, suggested Thursday that the president was “terribly advised” on his decision to pardon Binance founder Changpeng Zhao.
item.dc:creator: Julia Shapero, The Hill

item.title: Anthropic signs billion-dollar deal with Google Cloud
item.description: US-based AI company Anthropic has signed a major deal with Google Cloud that is said to be worth tens of billions of dollars. As part of the deal, Anthropic will have access to up to one million of Google’s purpose-built Tensor Processing Unit (TPU) AI accelerators.
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: Spotify gives parents new power to control what their kids hear on streaming platform
item.description: Spotify's managed accounts for kids under 13 now available in at least seven countries, allowing parents to filter and block explicit content and songs.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Microsoft adds Copilot Mode to Edge as AI browser race heats up
item.description: Microsoft is enhancing its Edge browser with Copilot Mode to strengthen its AI capabilities, as it struggles to compete with Chrome’s dominance and a wave of emerging AI-native browsers.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: What CIOs can learn at TechCrunch Disrupt 2025
item.description: AI is arguably one of the most disruptive forces for enterprises since the advent of cloud computing, making it a natural focus for many of the presentations at TechCrunch Disrupt 2025. The event, in San Francisco from Oct.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Can’t wait for the touchscreen MacBook Pro M6? This wild, affordable accessory brings touch to your current Mac
item.description: The LapTouch can add touchscreen functionality to any MacBook for a fraction of the cost of a new Mac.
item.dc:creator: Alex Blake, TechRadar

item.title: In a California farming region, researchers are mapping rural heat to protect farmworkers
item.description: In the summers, the sky is jet black when Raul Cruz arrives at this Imperial Valley sugarcane field to start his day. He chops, cleans and bundles the crop, taking heed as the sun rises. It's hard work, but so is starting at 4 a.m.
item.dc:creator: DORANY PINEDA and JAE C. HONG, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: OpenAI seeks to automate ‘computer use’ for Macs in the enterprise
item.description: While AI bots have begun mastering tasks in browsers and on Windows, Mac-using enterprises have largely been overlooked, until now. OpenAI aims to change that with its acquisition of generative AI interface maker Software Applications Incorporated.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Eyeing up an NBN 750 plan? I’d save your money and make this financially savvy decision instead
item.description: The September NBN speed upgrades introduced a slew of new plan options, including NBN 750. I've not been convinced by its value, and would make this smarter financial move instead.
item.dc:creator: Max Langridge, TechRadar

item.title: Scammers are targeting cloud systems to make off with hauls of gift cards
item.description: Gift cards are ideal for hackers since they can easily be redeemed or sold without sharing personally identifiable data.
item.dc:creator: Sead Fadilpašić, TechRadar

item.title: Florida test scores rise, attendance improves after cellphone ban
item.description: A new study finds that Florida test scores rose and attendance improved after a school cellphone ban, although short-term disciplinary problems also arose in the state.
item.dc:creator: Lexi Lonas Cochran, The Hill

item.title: With federal HR in flux, smaller teams are finding smarter ways to do more with less
item.description: "When you do any type of workforce reductions, you have to realize that you're also going to have attrition. Employees are going to leave," Rick Hammell said. The post With federal HR in flux, smaller teams are finding smarter ways to do more with less first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Terry Gerton, Federal News Network

item.title: Teens face new PG-13 limits on Instagram
item.description: New Instagram parental controls allow families to manage teen screen time and content limits through the Family Center with stricter safety settings.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: China accuses US of cyberattack on national time center
item.description: BEIJING (AP) — China on Sunday accused the U.S. National Security Agency of carrying out cyberattacks on its national time center, saying any damage to related facilities could have disrupted network communications, financial systems and power supply.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Teens turning to AI for love and comfort
item.description: Survey of 1,000 students shows teens using AI for personal relationships while two-thirds of parents remain unaware of their children's AI usage.
item.dc:creator: Fox News
